title: Featured on mindbodygreen!
excerpt: So honored to have been featured on the mindbodygreen blog . Had no idea what a beautiful and resourceful site it is until my partner manager at Kin sent me a link with the subject "Check you out!" I've been…
body:
So honored to have been featured on the mindbodygreen blog. Had no idea what a beautiful and resourceful site it is until my partner manager at Kin sent me a link with the subject "Check you out!" 

I've been following them on Twitter ever since and I'm really enjoying their articles and content.
